section_title: Bank's slip prima facie evidence for certain facts
chapter_title: Of Penalties in Case of Dishonour of Certain Cheques for Insufficiency of Funds in the Accounts
text: The Court shall, in respect of every proceeding under this Chapter, on production of bank’s slip or memo having thereon the official mark denoting that the cheque has been dishonoured, presume the fact of dishonour of such cheque, unless and until such fact is disproved.
